tasks.label: wave1-review-lint-typecheck
args: lint_exit=0; type_exit=0; pnpm exec eslint packages/kl-plugin-storage-mysql/src packages/kl-plugin-storage-postgresql/src packages/kanban-lite/src/cli packages/kanban-lite/src/mcp-server packages/kanban-lite/src/shared/types.ts packages/kanban-lite/src/sdk/modules/boards.ts packages/kl-plugin-storage-sqlite/src/index.ts || lint_exit=$?; pnpm --filter kanban-lite exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit || type_exit=$?; echo "LINT_EXIT=$lint_exit TYPE_EXIT=$type_exit"; if [ "$lint_exit" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$lint_exit"; fi; exit "$type_exit"
